review_text: I've tried Dyson, Shark, iRobot, and Roomba before settling on the CleanBot X9. Honestly? The CleanBot X9 beats Dyson on suction by a mile and costs half the price. The navigation is smarter than iRobot. Only Shark comes close in terms of battery, but CleanBot wins overall. Happy customer.

scoring_notes.notes: All 4 competitor mentions must be captured
